THEAPPRENTICE-PLANNED.title: Planned
THEAPPRENTICE-PLANNED.description: [gold]Unplayable[/gold]. Some cards can play all [gold]Planned[/gold] cards in the order they were planned.
THEAPPRENTICE-DREAMY.title: Dreamy
THEAPPRENTICE-DREAMY.description: Gain 1 additional [gold]Block[/gold] for each [gold]Dream[/gold] created this combat.
THEAPPRENTICE-AMBITOUS.title: Ambitous
THEAPPRENTICE-AMBITOUS.description: Deal 1 additional damage for each [gold]Ambition[/gold] created this combat.
THEAPPRENTICE-EXPEND.title: Expend
